change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value:
The project has 9 components under three (Energy Access, Clean Energy and Capacity Building) main categories; 5 components for Loan portion and 2 components for Grant portion. Asian Development has provided a Loan of SDR 41.127 million (equivalent to US$ 65 million) and  a Grant of US$ 4.5 million.
The Loan portion consists of following components: 
1. Facilitating Access to Clean Energy
2. Energy Access Quality Enhancement
3. Clean Energy Improvement
4. Supply-side Energy Efficiency Improvement; and
5. Capacity Building.
The Grant portion consists of following components:
1. Energy Efficiency in Lighting; and
2. Renewable Energy for Street Lighting.
Budget Head                   Name of the Project                                                  Allocated amount (in Rs. ’ooo)
                                                                                                                                      Loan                     Grant
 
87-4655   132 kv and Other transmission Line Expansion Projects:
                    i)  Dumre-Damauli-Marsyangdi 132 kv TL     (loan)                                          
                    ii) Butwal- Kohalpur- Mahendranagar 132 kv TL   (loan)                                 
                     iii) Matatirtha S/SExpansion Project  (loan)                                                         
                     iv) Chapali  132kv Subststion Project    (loan)                                                 
                    v) Distribution System Augmentation Project      (loan)                                    
                   vi) Loss reduction in Kathmandu, Birjinj and Simara Corridor   (loan)         
                   vii) Street Light Rehabilitation     (grant)                                                                                                
                   viii) CFL Program      (grant)                                                                                             
                    ix) Capacitor Bank      (loan)                                                                               
                    x) Distribution System Consuling Service    (loan & grant)                                            
87-4-714     Power Station Reinforcement and Maintenance & Repair Projects:
                    i)  Marsyangdi HPS  (loan)                                                                                               
                   ii)  Gandaki HPS    (loan)
